description.sr: Sve konsultacije su uvek besplatne — dođite, popričajmo i napravimo plan tretmana prilagođen vama.
description.en: All consultations are always free — come in, let's talk and design a treatment plan tailored to you.

title.sr: Popust od 50% na TESLA EMS body sculpt tretmane do kraja jula!
title.en: 50% discount on TESLA EMS body sculpt treatments until the end of July!

description.sr: Sjajna prilika da oblikujete vaše telo i izađete zategnuti na plažu! Iskoristite ovaj odličan popust do kraja jula!
description.en: A great opportunity to sculpt your body and step onto the beach feeling toned and confident! Take advantage of this amazing discount until the end of July!
